case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. ARTURO RUIZ DZIB

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-13-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-13-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO IN IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY CAROLINA PALACIOS DOMINGUEZ, SENIOR CUSTOMER SERVICE REPRESENTATIVE. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT ARTURO RUIZ DZIB. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-13-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DZIB, ARTURO RUIZ $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $215.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,715.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 6/13/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
